title: rubus hamatulus
intro: Rubus hamatulus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus hamatulus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract for use in herbal remedies.
